articles.author: Tara Copp
articles.title: Pentagon says U.S. will cut thousands of troops from Europe - The Washington Post
articles.description: Poland was set to receive forces whose deployment was abruptly halted last week.
articles.content: The Pentagon announced late Tuesday that it was pausing the deployment of any additional troops to NATOally Poland as the Trump administration moves forward with its America First agenda and pulls th… [+29 chars]
